rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the claim of being the first system to provide calibrated abstention behavior for general manipulation instructions is overreached or inconsistent with the described method).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the claim that max-prob and entropy are usually strongly correlated may not hold tightly for this particular scorer; the 14-point gap may have a legitimate explanation, but it warrants justification in the text).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the claim of no regressions is not entirely accurate as there are some smaller issues that need addressing).
